head.limitTitle: Your plan limit has been reached

banner.limitBold: The {{plan}} plan limit has been reached
banner.limitContact: Contact us for an upgrade at

empty.none: No companies yet. Add your first company with the "Add company" button.
empty.filtered: No records for the applied filters.

confirm.delete: Delete company "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

notify.limitInfo: Your plan limit has been reached. Contact us for an upgrade at support@efactura.ro

micro.title: Micro-enterprise threshold
micro.ps: 100,000 EUR (OUG 89/2025) at the BNR rate of 31.12.{{year}} = {{rate}} →
micro.footNa: the company is on profit tax
micro.foot: when exceeded → 16% profit tax from the following quarter

vat.title: VAT registration threshold
vat.footNa: the company is already registered for VAT

cash.title: Cash-accounting VAT threshold
cash.psSuffix: turnover — only for companies on cash-accounting VAT
cash.footNa: the company does not apply cash-accounting VAT
cash.footExceeded: the cash-accounting VAT threshold has been exceeded

banner.exceeded: The micro threshold has been exceeded ({{pct}}%).
banner.body1: When the {{amount}} lei threshold is exceeded, the company switches to
banner.body2: starting with the quarter of the exceedance (OUG 89/2025). The monitoring also appears on Overview.

form.newSub: Details are filled in automatically from the ANAF registry by CUI

anaf.tooltip: Fetch the company details from ANAF by CUI
anaf.found: Found in ANAF — details filled in automatically
anaf.notFound: The CUI was not found in the ANAF database.

regime.hint: 2026 micro threshold: 100,000 EUR (OUG 89/2025) — when exceeded, the company switches to profit tax from the quarter of the exceedance

form.seriesHint: appears on all issued invoices (e.g. FACT-0001)
form.seriesHintIssued_one: {{count}} invoice has already been issued with the current series — changing it requires confirmation
form.seriesHintIssued_other: {{count}} invoices have already been issued with the current series — changing it requires confirmation

spvNote.bold: The SPV/ANAF connection and the company logo
spvNote.rest: are configured after saving, from the company page. Logo: PNG or SVG, recommended 400×400 px — it appears on PDF invoices.

validation.cui: Format: 2-10 digits, optionally prefixed with RO.

confirm.series_one: The company has already issued {{count}} invoice with the series "{{oldSeries}}". Changing the series to "{{newSeries}}" may break the numbering continuity. Do you want to continue?
confirm.series_other: The company has already issued {{count}} invoices with the series "{{oldSeries}}". Changing the series to "{{newSeries}}" may break the numbering continuity. Do you want to continue?

spv.title: ANAF SPV system
spv.connectedDesc: This company can send electronic invoices directly to ANAF.
spv.notConnectedDesc: To send electronic invoices, connect the digital certificate for this company.
spv.notifyCancelled: The SPV authorization was cancelled or failed. Try again.
